examples: Most Johns Hopkins hemispherectomy patients are older than five years.
Objective To explore the clinical effectiveness of hemispherectomy on intractable epilepsy.
Objective to explore the effectiveness of modified hemispherectomy for intractable epilepsy in patients with infantile hemiplegia.
For instance, children with severe epilepsy that doesn't respond to medication sometimes undergo a procedure called a functional hemispherectomy, wherein the nondominant half of the brain is removed.
